chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-588 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.2579/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.2580/2021 (E/ A). 04. For hearing of main case. 26.10.2021 Mr. Waseem Akhtar Soomro, Advocate for petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. By way of instant petition, the petitioner has sought for direction against Taluka Education Officer, Ratodero, to forward application for his retirement to the District Education Officer, Larkana. The petitioner if is a public servant and is intending to retire from public service, then he can do it in accordance with law, without asking for direction from this Court for forwarding his application for his retirement from one office to other. No infringement of fundamental right of the petitioner is evident, which may justify him to invoke the extra ordinary constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E
